'''Rkk'Tl'Kt''' was a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] in the warband led by [[Sharad Hett]]. During [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett's]] initiation rite, Rkk'Tl'Kt's hand was bitten off by a [[Canyon krayt dragon/Legends|canyon krayt dragon]] female. Unable to wield a [[Gaderffii/Legends|gaffi stick]] one-handed, Rkk'Tl'Kt chose suicide. Sharad Hett gave him a dagger and he stabbed himself in the stomach. [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] passed his body while tailing Sharad.<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 10" />
